ops.text: Phase 4 watcher runtime DONE (shadow mode). cc_transcript/watch.py (byte-offset polling tailer, partial-line holdback, truncation reset, per-file uuid dedupe, sidechain flagging via discovery.is_subagent_path; cc-transcript watch CLI; 18 tests) + cc_steer/watcher/ package: types.py (SteerProposal, CascadeConfig), cascade.py (Gate/Drafter/Refiner protocols; HeuristicGate v0, SpawnDrafter few-shot, SpawnRefiner w/ exemplars; cooldown+max-per-session ledger sits before the gate so a trained gate drops in unchanged; proposal row recorded for every stage-2 invocation incl. abstentions), delivery.py (ShadowDelivery -> ~/.cc-steer/shadow.db, UNIQUE(session,anchor); CaptHookDelivery deferred, gated on shadow metrics), daemon.py (per-session buffers, 2s debounce, evaluate_session per completed turn, dedupe per (session,turn)), shadow.py (time-window join vs feedback_events, 30min default). CLI: cc-steer watch --shadow / shadow report [--json]. PARITY PROVEN IN TESTS: live_window to_json == fold_trigger(capture_window(...)) exactly, and flattened watcher_prompt == gate_text byte-for-byte. 261 cc-steer tests green, ty+ruff clean. Backward-only exclusion radius shipped in cc-transcript sampling (pre-steer approach is label-conflicted; post-steer turns are genuine negatives) — random negatives 19 -> 1,760 after size floor (32KB) + radius fix + per-session 20 over all 1,379 working sessions. Gate view now 12,410 train / 1,364 test; watcher 5,544 / 637. E1 gate bake-off agent launched in cc-steer-lab.
